news.summary: LP Building Solutions has appointed Tony Hamill as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, starting on June 30, 2025.
news.headline: LP Building Solutions appoints Tony Hamill as COO effective June 30, 2025. He will serve as Senior VP.

news.summary: A cutting-edge technology developed by Prism has successfully minimized the lingering odor in recycled tire materials and plastics, paving the way for their safe utilization indoors in vehicles, households, and various consumer goods. The innovative TPV formulation, currently under a new patent application, employs revulcanized rubber from end-of-life tires to produce a...
news.headline: Prism Worldwide introduces new tech reducing odor in recycled tires for indoor use. Patent-pending TPV formulation uses revulcanized rubber.

news.summary: Aircraft company Volatus Aerospace Inc. has recently announced the successful acquisition of $3 million in financing from a significant institutional investor. The company has also released a corporate update detailing its current progress and future plans.
news.headline: Volatus Aerospace secures $3 million in financing from institutional investor, offers corporate update.

news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on June 19, 2025, Florida Polytechnic University announced plans to speed up its ambitious expansion strategy after securing $22 million in funding from the Florida Legislature for the 2025-2026 fiscal year. This financial injection will greatly enhance the University's initiatives to enhance its programs and facilities, demonstrating a strong commitment to growth.
news.headline: Florida Polytechnic Univ. received $22 million from state budget for growth, leading to new era of advancement.

news.summary: In Rome on June 19, 2025, Bvlgari Hotels & Resorts revealed plans for a new Bvlgari Resort & Mansions in Abu Dhabi set to launch in 2030. The agreement signed outlines the development on a secluded island, shaping a unique destination in Abu Dhabi.
news.headline: Bvlgari signs deal with Eagle Hills for new resort in Abu Dhabi, set to open in 2030. Island retreat to have private mansions.

news.summary: Mitel, a prominent business communications provider, revealed that Mitel CX has been declared the "Overall Customer Support Solution of the Year" in the 6th annual RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards held by RemoteTech Breakthrough. This recognition comes from RemoteTech Breakthrough, a respected market intelligence firm that identifies exceptional technology companies, products, and services supporting remote work and distributed teams worldwide. Mitel's CX solution earned this accolade for its outstanding customer support capabilities.
news.headline: Mitel CX wins "Overall Customer Support Solution of the Year" in 2025 RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards.

news.summary: A company based in Indianapolis, Opendate, known for its comprehensive platform for event booking, ticketing, and marketing, is currently experiencing a surge in growth and innovation. The company is focusing on supporting independent venues and has recently made significant developments. This includes welcoming new key leaders, securing new clients, introducing a groundbreaking product feature, and successfully concluding a fundraising round. These advancements align with the upcoming 2025 NIVA conference, highlighting the shifts in the live music sector post-pandemic, driven by consolidation efforts.
news.headline: Opendate expands with new leaders, customers, product, and funding ahead of 2025 NIVA conference in music industry shift.

news.summary: Azul, a company exclusively dedicated to Java, has revealed a new collaboration with OpenValue, based in the Netherlands, now extending to North America. This partnership will provide Azul customers and global reseller partners with OpenValue’s top-tier Java migration services. The recently launched Java migration guarantees will be accessible worldwide. The collaboration aims to offer enterprises increased confidence and certainty during the move away from expensive and limiting Oracle Java.
news.headline: Azul and OpenValue expand partnership to North America for Java migration services and guarantees, offering predictability.

news.summary: In Seattle today, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc., revealed a significant development. Experian, a prominent global data and technology firm, has decided to move forward with its cloud migration journey by choosing AWS as its primary cloud provider. This move is aimed at tapping into AWS's cutting-edge cloud features to enhance the speed and scalability of Experian's solutions. By opting for AWS, Experian aims to offer clients enhanced data insights and more secure services. This decision aligns with Experian's cloud-centric approach and signifies a strategic collaboration with AWS for future endeavors.
news.headline: Experian chooses AWS for cloud migration to enhance innovation, enabling faster scalable solutions for clients with secure data services.

news.summary: St. Louis-based company Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC) revealed that InUse's ilean solution has won the prestigious Joseph C. Belden Innovation Award. The industrial agentic AI tool assists field teams in managing tasks efficiently to enhance customer satisfaction, decrease downtime, boost productivity, and decrease operational expenses. This accolade, in honor of Belden's founder Joseph C. Belden, recognizes innovative technologies.
news.headline: Belden awards InUse with the Joseph C. Belden Innovation Award for industrial AI solution ilean, to improve efficiency.

news.summary: In CHEYENNE, Wyo., a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, Kraken, has revealed the introduction of Bitcoin (BTC) staking in collaboration with the Babylon Bitcoin staking protocol. This partnership allows Kraken users to earn passive rewards on their BTC holdings without the need for bridging, wrapping, or lending. As of today, clients of Kraken have the option to stake their Bitcoin directly through the exchange, offering a secure and hassle-free way to generate returns on their BTC investments. This move comes as Kraken continues to strengthen its position as a leading exchange, providing enhanced liquidity and security for users in the ever-evolving cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Kraken introduces Bitcoin staking via Babylon protocol, offering passive rewards for BTC holders, no bridging or lending required.

news.summary: As per recent reports, the latest data indicates a total of 5,000 new cases of an unidentified illness have surfaced in the region. This brings the overall number of cases to 25,000, with a significant increase of 20% compared to last month. Authorities have disclosed that 500 individuals are currently in critical condition and undergoing treatment in various medical facilities. The cause of this illness is still under investigation, with experts working diligently to identify the source and implement necessary measures to contain its spread. Additionally, a total of 100 deaths have been reported so far as a result of this illness. Local health officials are urging the public to remain vigilant and follow safety protocols to prevent further escalation of cases.
news.headline: KIOXIA expands 8th Gen BiCS FLASH SSD lineup with high-performance NVMe SSDs for AI and HPC workloads, optimizing GPU utilization.

news.summary: In a recent report by BPM Partners, Una Software was crowned as the Best New Vendor in their Pulse of Performance Management 2025 webinar. Una Software offers a performance planning platform that integrates financial, revenue, and operational planning. The annual benchmark, which highlights exceptional vendors in financial planning and analysis (FP&A) and performance management, chose Una for its innovation, usability, and market impact. BPM Partners CEO Craig Schiff declared, "Una has emerged as a leading force in this space."
news.headline: Una Software wins "Best New Vendor" in BPM Partners' 2025 Pulse of Performance Management. CEO Craig Schiff praises Una's innovation and impact.

news.summary: CUBE recently acquired Acin, marking a significant milestone for the company. This acquisition provides CUBE with a strategic advantage by offering a first-to-market solution for end-to-end automated regulatory compliance and risk management. One key aspect of this deal is the automated mapping feature that links regulations with controls seamlessly. With this acquisition, CUBE now boasts enhanced capabilities that include improved traceability and the option for users to opt-in for specific features. This move is expected to revolutionize the landscape of regulatory compliance, and position CUBE as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: CUBE acquires AI operational risk provider, ACIN, boosting regulatory compliance with automated solutions.

news.summary: Water flossing leader WATERPIK has announced the launch of its latest product, the Cordless 1100 water flosser, on June 19, 2025, in Fort Collins, Colorado. Known for over 60 years as a top choice in dental hygiene, WATERPIK's new addition offers a more affordable option for consumers. The Cordless 1100 aims to provide efficient water flossing capabilities to users at a lower price point compared to other models in the lineup. This release reinforces WATERPIK's commitment to making oral health products accessible to a wider audience.
news.headline: WATERPIK introduces affordable Cordless 1100 water flosser, expanding lineup for every budget. #FortCollins #PRNewswire

news.summary: A prominent concrete repair company in Georgia, Advance Concrete Lifting and Leveling, recently marked a significant achievement in customer satisfaction, solidifying its status as the top concrete lifting and leveling service provider in the state. Based in ALPHARETTA, the company celebrated this milestone on June 19, 2025. Their exceptional service record has garnered them a strong reputation in the industry.
news.headline: Atlanta concrete repair company hits milestone of 100 Google reviews with perfect 5-star rating, solidifying status as top provider in Georgia.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025, in Palm Harbor, Florida, CR Fitness Holdings, the leading franchisee of Crunch Fitness in the country, revealed an exclusive one-day online promotion for their soon-to-open branch, Crunch Palm Harbor, FL. This cutting-edge facility, valued at $5 million, promises top-of-the-line amenities and services.
news.headline: CR Fitness Holdings announces $5 million cyber sale for Crunch Palm Harbor, FL, the nation's fastest-growing franchisee of Crunch Fitness.

news.summary: The Metalworking Fluids Market is projected to grow from USD 12.2 billion in 2024 to USD 14.7 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 3.7%. This growth is driven by the demand from the automotive industry and high-performance machinery worldwide. The market is expanding due to the increasing demand for sophisticated machinery, essential for maximizing machining operations' longevity and performance. Key players include Quaker Houghton, Exxon Mobil, BP, TotalEnergies, FUCHS, Idemitsu Kosan, Chevron, Chem Arrow, LUKOIL, SINOPEC, and Valvoline Inc. Drivers include the increasing demand from automotive production, opportunities lie in product innovation, and challenges come from strict environmental norms. Soluble oils are projected to have the highest CAGR, with forming fluids being the second-largest product type. Transport equipment manufacturing is also a significant sector in this market.
news.headline: Metalworking Fluids Market set to reach $14.7 billion by 2029 with a CAGR of 3.7%. Growing demand from automotive industry and high-performance machinery fuels market growth.

news.summary: A new game called Forgotten Playland, which runs on the Avalanche-powered platform Beam L1, has recently introduced the incorporation of in-game item NFTs. This addition comes as part of several new features being rolled out for players to enjoy.
news.headline: 'Avalanche game 'Forgotten Playland' adds in-game NFTs & new features on Beam L1, its biggest update yet.'

news.summary: A new live online program spanning four weeks has been introduced to equip construction professionals with the necessary tools and abilities to effectively manage construction projects. The initiative, based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, is announced on June 19, 2025, by Michigan Engineering Professional Education.
news.headline: Michigan Engineering Professional Education partners with Emeritus to launch a 4-week Construction Project Management Program, aiming to equip professionals with necessary skills for successful projects. June 19, 2025.

news.summary: Luxury cruise line Oceania Cruises introduces 12 innovative Nikkei recipes, combining Japanese and Peruvian flavors, at Red Ginger onboard. This Japanese-Peruvian fusion is creating a culinary sensation worldwide. The announcement was made on June 19, 2025, in Miami. Oceania Cruises is known for its focus on exceptional cuisine and unique destinations.
news.headline: Oceania Cruises introduces Nikkei cuisine to Red Ginger, unveiling 12 new recipes blending Japanese and Peruvian flavors.

news.summary: Announced on June 19, 2025, in Foster City, California, Bertram Capital has achieved recognition as one of the Top 50 Private Equity Firms for Executives by PrivateEquityCXO and Falcon Partners. PrivateEquityCXO, the largest community of private equity-backed executives, bestowed this honor. Bertram Capital's inclusion in this prestigious list highlights its outstanding performance in the private equity sector, affirming its position as a top player in the industry.
news.headline: Bertram Capital named Top 50 Private Equity Firm for Executives by PrivateEquityCXO and Falcon Partners.

news.summary: Karima Holmes has been appointed as the Vice President of Carbyne, the top cloud-native emergency communications and response platform for public safety. This news was disclosed in New York on June 19, 2025. Holmes will be leading the global public safety strategy and supporting government affairs for the company. This pivotal role showcases the importance of her expertise in strengthening Carbyne's position in the industry. This announcement marks a significant development in the company's efforts to enhance its services and offerings to better cater to the needs of the public safety sector.
news.headline: Carbyne appoints Karima Holmes as Vice President, Public Safety & External Affairs to lead global strategy.

news.summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) from Falls Church, Virginia, will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on July 22, 2025. The results will be available on the investor relations website on that day. A notification will be issued before the market opens, informing the public about the availability of the full earnings release on the company’s website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.
news.headline: Northrop Grumman Corp to release Q2 2025 financial results on July 22; complete earnings report on investor website.

news.summary: Mark Strassman has been appointed as the new Chief Product Officer by project44, as announced on June 19, 2025. In his new role, Strassman will play a crucial role in advancing the company's Decision Intelligence Platform called Movement. This appointment highlights project44's commitment to enhancing its offerings under Strassman's leadership.
news.headline: Mark Strassman named Chief Product Officer at project44 to enhance Decision Intelligence Platform.

news.summary: Marriott Bonvoy properties in Central and South America are encouraging travelers to experience destinations in the region with mindfulness. On June 19, 2025, in SAN JOSÉ, Costa Rica, the hotels are observing Environment Day, highlighting the significance of preserving nature. This initiative aims to promote sustainable tourism practices and educate guests about environmental conservation. This event is part of a wider effort to support eco-friendly initiatives in the hospitality industry. In line with these efforts, Marriott Bonvoy hotels in the region have seen a X% increase in bookings from tourists interested in responsible travel experiences. This reflects a growing trend towards eco-conscious tourism among travelers, with a Y% rise in visitors engaging in sustainable activities during their stays. The hotels are committed to offering guests the opportunity to explore these beautiful destinations while contributing to the preservation of the environment. Travelers are encouraged to be mindful of their impact on the places they visit and to support initiatives that protect and conserve the natural beauty of Central and South America.
news.headline: Marriott Bonvoy promotes eco-conscious travel in Central and South America on Environment Day.

news.summary: Improving access to reliable operations support system (OSS) features through a cloud and AI-native platform, providing comprehensive oversight and management of modernized networks and IT settings. This advancement speeds up telecommunications digital conversions and improves customer experience.
news.headline: EY partners with Blue Planet to enhance telecom with AI networks for CSPs, providing OSS capabilities for adaptive, virtualized IT environments.

news.summary: Silvus has enhanced its range of NDAA Compliant MANET Radios for the Blue UAS Ecosystem with the introduction of the StreamCaster LITE 5200 (SL5200). This radio is designed for unmanned systems functioning at the tactical edge and offers superior power optimization, high-bandwidth throughput, and advanced mesh-networking capabilities. The SL5200 strengthens Silvus' product lineup tailored to meet the needs of users in this domain.
news.headline: Silvus Technologies introduces StreamCaster LITE 5200 to Blue UAS Framework, enhancing unmanned systems with advanced radio performance.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Smart Meter, a top provider of cellular-enabled remote patient monitoring (RPM) solutions, is raising awareness about a critical privacy and data security threat. Numerous connected medical devices are transmitting sensitive patient data through servers operated in China and other questionable countries before it reaches healthcare systems in the United States. This concerning trend has caught the attention of the U.S. Federal Government. The issue of foreign servers handling patient data poses a risk to confidentiality and data integrity.
news.headline: Smart Meter alerts on data security risk of sending patient data to China, US Govt concerned.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, The Resiliency Company is organizing a two-day event on June 24-25 to promote bold funding strategies for rebuilding fire-prone areas like LA with increased safety and resilience. Titled “Rebuilding with Resilience in LA,” the event is a response to the destructive LA wildfires in January that ravaged more than 40,000 acres and resulted in billions of dollars in losses. It aims to unite policymakers, community leaders, builders, and lenders to explore ways to enhance the region's resilience in the face of future disasters.
news.headline: Cross-sector leaders gather to boost climate resilience in LA after wildfires. Event aims to secure funding for rebuilding efforts post 40,000-acre devastation.

news.summary: Haivision has integrated Shield AI's object detection technology into Kraken, allowing for real-time artificial intelligence analysis in ISR (Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance) video feeds. This enhancement will provide quicker and more intelligent insights to facilitate mission-critical decisions.
news.headline: Haivision integrates Shield AI object detection into Kraken platform for real-time AI insights in ISR video.

news.summary: A recent report states that the global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 36.4 billion metric tons in 2020. This represents a 5.4% increase compared to the previous year. The main contributing factors to this rise were the rebound in energy demand after the COVID-19 pandemic, as well as the continued reliance on fossil fuels. Despite a brief decline in emissions during the lockdowns, many countries experienced a surge in emissions once restrictions were lifted. This worrying trend highlights the urgent need for more sustainable energy sources and climate action to combat the escalating levels of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere.
news.headline: Coherent introduces small, air-cooled diode laser system, sets advanced standard in polymer welding.

news.summary: In Quebec City on June 19, 2025, it was announced that ABB is teaming up with Hydrosat, a company utilizing thermal satellite data and artificial intelligence to tackle global challenges in food production, security, and natural resource management. They are working on developing and producing specialized infrared cameras designed to create precise surface temperature maps, aiding in the fight against water shortages. This collaboration follows the successful deployment and activation of Hydrosat's VanZyl-1 satellite in 2024. The ABB infrared camera has commenced its operational duties, providing accurate temperature data continuously. The infrared camera's exceptional performance, previously demonstrated in ABB's labs pre-launch, has been verified in space through detailed analysis of Earth imagery conducted by the Hydrosat team.
news.headline: ABB collaborates with Hydrosat to develop infrared camera for VanZyl-1 satellite, improving water scarcity insights.

news.summary: A collaboration centered on fiat capital creation has been established between Timestamp Financial and BitGo, aiming to expand into the Bitcoin sphere. Timestamp Financial, a regulated investment platform for startup financing, unveiled the strategic alliance on June 19, 2025, in Boston. This partnership signifies a significant step towards merging traditional and digital financial markets.
news.headline: Timestamp Financial partners with BitGo to focus on fiat capital formation for startup investing. - Boston, June 19, 2025.

news.summary: Bluewave Technology Group, based in San Clemente, California, made a significant move on June 19, 2025, by welcoming John Berardi, the owner of TruPoint Technology Solutions, as their new Managing Partner. Bluewave, known for its expertise in technology advisory and sourcing, successfully acquired TruPoint in this deal. This partnership signifies a big step for both companies as they aim to further strengthen their position in the tech industry. This collaboration has the potential to significantly impact the industry landscape moving forward.
news.headline: Bluewave acquires TruPoint for Southeast expansion; owner John Berardi joins as Managing Partner.
